claims.summary: Artifact-heavy output should expose how much semantic remainder survives rather than only a boolean.
claims.disposition: verify remainder texture carries alphanumeric, structural, repeated-form, and density-proxy evidence beside the boolean cleanup predicate

claims.summary: High entropy near a short budget may create pressure even when cleanup succeeds.
claims.disposition: verify budget-friction and context-packing diagnostics combine prompt trimming with spectral texture without changing the provider request

claims.summary: Artifact structure must not be called meaningless merely because known tokens were removed.
claims.disposition: verify structure-only remainder is retained for semantic review and meaning-from-form remains explicitly unestablished
